ActivateServiceToAllow: Activate this service to allow paid backups using your wallet balance
ActivateToProBannerHeaderTrial: Buy the full {{license}} version to get:

AddCreditsToEnableAI: Adding credits will automatically enable {{organizationName}} AI and make models available to all users. Continue?
AdditionalResourcesDescription: Choose whether you want to display links to additional resources in {{productName}} menu.
AdditionalResourcesSubtitle: Configure the display of links to helpful resources for your users.
AdjustStorageToExactAmount: Adjust the storage to the exact amount you require
AdministratorDescription: {{productName}} configuration, room creation and administration, ability to invite and manage users in {{productName}} and in virtual rooms, ability to manage access rights.
AIAgentDescription: Enable AI assistant that can answer questions about completed form submissions.
AIAgentsDescription: Set up a personalized assistant for your team by adding a knowledge base, selecting the ideal model, and connecting an {{mcpServer}}.
AICanMakeMistakes: AI can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.
AICreditsHelper: Top up with any amount — credits never expire. Credits are deducted automatically based on actual usage.
AIDisabledInfoBlockAdminSaasDescription: AI capabilities are currently turned off, which means this agent can’t process chats or tasks. To restore full functionality, enable AI features in the {{productName}} settings.
AIDisabledInfoBlockAdminStandaloneDescri: AI capabilities are currently turned off, which means this agent can’t process chats or tasks. Connect your own AI service to unlock advanced features in {{productName}}.
AIDisabledInfoBlockUserDescription: AI capabilities are currently turned off, which means this agent can’t process chats or tasks. To get back on track, ask your {{productName}} admin to enable AI features.
AIGetStartedStep1Description: Transfer credits from your {{productName}} wallet to {{organizationName}} AI. If your wallet is empty, top it up first. Credits never expire.
AIGetStartedStep1Title: Add funds to your AI balance
AIGetStartedStep2Description: Once you add credits, all AI features become available instantly. No additional setup required.
AIGetStartedStep3Description: Each AI request automatically deducts credits based on the feature and model in use, ensuring charges align with actual usage.
AIGetStartedStep3Title: Pay only for what you use
AIModelsIntro: Pick the right model for your task — from budget-friendly to advanced. <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> shown. A 20% service fee applies to usage.
AIPaywallCompletedHint: Loading your usage, transactions, and service controls...
AIPaywallCallbackKeepOpen: Please keep this tab open until the process completes.
AIPaywallCallbackErrorHint: Your card was saved, but we couldn't top up your AI balance. You can retry from AI services.
AIPaywallCallbackProcessingHint: We're loading credits and activating AI features. This usually takes a few seconds.
AIPaywallCallbackSuccessHint: {{price}} in credits is ready on your AI balance. Head back to your workspace to start using AI.
AIPaywallHeroSubtitle: Pay-as-you-go — no subscription, and credits never expire.
AIPaywallHeroTitle: Add AI to your workspace — ${{price}} to get started.
AIPaywallHeroTitleCompleted: Adding AI to your workspace — almost ready...
AIPaywallIncludedFeaturesLine1: Chat & agents · Text & image generation · Translation · Summaries
AIPaywallIncludedFeaturesLine2: OCR · Error checking · Knowledge base · Web search
AIPaywallSecureNote: Powered by Stripe. Your card is only charged when you top up — AI usage is deducted from this balance.
AiTopUpFundsNote: Funds load directly into your AI balance.
AIPricingAdditionalTooltipVectorization: <1>Vectorization</1> — Documents are processed and indexed when you upload them to Knowledge Base in AI agents.
AIPricingAdditionalTooltipWebCrawling: <1>Web crawling</1> — AI visits and extracts content from specific web pages to analyze or use in your request.
AIPricingAdditionalTooltipWebSearch: <1>Web search</1> — AI fetches real-time information from the web when needed for your request.
AIPricingFeeNoteUsage: * <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> + 20% service fee applies at usage
AIPricingIntro: AI features are pay-as-you-go. Credits are deducted from your balance based on actual usage.
AIPricingTokensTooltipInput: <1>Input tokens</1> — Text and data you send to AI models
AIProvidersNotAvailable: AI providers are not configured on this portal. Contact your administrator.
AIRoomDescription: A versatile chat powered by your chosen text model. Use it to solve everyday tasks and collaborate on text documents, spreadsheets, and presentations. All files added to the room are automatically used as context during your conversations with the chat.
AIServiceTopUpSuccess: AI service balance successfully topped up.
AIToolsDescription: Enabling {{organizationName}} AI will make {{organizationName}}-provided AI models available to all {{productName}} users.

AllTypesAvailableForEditing: all file types available for editing in {{organizationName}}

AmazonServiceTip: This is an optional property; change it only if you want to try a different service endpoint.
AmazonSSETip: The Server-side encryption algorithm used when storing this object in S3.

AssignRecipientsDescription: The form was successfully submitted to {{roomName}}. Assign recipient roles to the chosen users to enable form filling. Do you want to proceed now or get back to it later?

AutoSavePeriodHelp: The time shown below corresponds to the time zone set in the {{productName}}.

LibraryTemplateAboutText: This is a ready-made form template that you can use as a starting point for your document. Pick it, customize the fields to match your needs, then share it for filling. Completed forms are saved to My Forms where you can review, download, or process them with AI agents.
LibraryTemplateHowToText: Click "Use Template" to add a copy to My Forms. From there you can edit the form fields, set up the filling flow, and share it with recipients. Once filled, the results are collected automatically.

RegularUpdatesDescription: Receive one full year of access to all functional enhancements and security updates
RemainingDays: The remaining days of the billing cycle: {{count}}
ReportSaveLocation: The report will be saved to {{sectionName}}
RequestDetails: Please describe your request details here.
RestoreBackupConfirmAccessText: If your account is not included in the backup file, you will lose access. Please ensure you are restoring the correct backup file, as this action cannot be undone.
RestoreBackupConfirmAcknowledge: I acknowledge that all current data will be overwritten.
RestoreBackupConfirmBoldText: You are about to restore {{productName}} from a backup file.
RestoreBackupConfirmReplaceText: This process will completely replace all current data, including the owner, users, and settings.
RestoreBackupDescription: Use this option to restore your space from the previously saved backup file.
RestoreBackupResetInfoWarningText: All current passwords will be reset. {{productName}} users will get an email with the access restoration link.
RestoreBackupWarningText: {{productName}} will become unavailable during the restore process. After the restore is complete all the changes made after the date of the selected restore point will be lost.
RestrictionDownloadCopyRoom: You cannot disable the restriction on downloading and copying data because this setting is enforced at the room level for all files.
ReviewAction: Review each action carefully before approving.
RoleAIAgentContentCreatorDescription:
Content creators can use the chat and work with files in Result storage.
They can upload files to the knowledge base but can’t manage users or access agent settings.
RoleAIAgentManagerDescription:
Agent managers can manage the assigned {{aiAgent}}, invite new users, and assign roles below their level.
They can use the chat, upload knowledge files, work with Result storage, and manage chat settings.
RoleAIAgentViewerDescription:
Viewers can only view files in Result storage with outputs generated by others.
They do not have access to the chat or the knowledge base.
RoleCommentatorDescription: Operations with existing files: viewing, commenting.
RoleContentCreatorDescription: Content creators can create and edit files in the room, but can't manage users, or access settings.
RoleEditorDescription: Operations with existing files: viewing, editing, form filling, reviewing, commenting.
RoleFormFillerDescription: Operations with existing files: viewing, form filling, reviewing, commenting.
RoleFormFillerFormRoomDescription: Form fillers can fill out forms and view only their completed/started forms within the Complete and In Process folders.
RoleNewUserDescription:
Users can only access the rooms they are invited to by admins. They can't create own rooms, folders or files.
<1>In {{agentSection}}: can view the {{aiAgent}} results and shared chats if they were invited, but cannot create chats or modify the knowledge base.
RolePortalAdminDescription:
{{productName}} admins can access {{productName}} settings, manage and archive rooms, invite new users and assign roles below their level. All admins have access to the {{sectionName}} section.
<1>In {{agentSection}}: can create, configure and manage {{agentSection}}, including their knowledge base and access settings.
RolePowerUserFormRoomDescription: Users can upload forms to the room and have full access to the Complete and In Process folders.
RoleReviewerDescription: Operations with existing files: viewing, reviewing, commenting.
RoleRoomAdminDescription:
Room admins can create and manage the assigned rooms, invite new users and assign roles below their level. All admins have access to the {{sectionName}} section.
<1>In {{agentSection}}: can create and manage {{agentSection}}, including their knowledge base and access settings.
RoleRoomAdminFormRoomDescription: Room admins can create and manage rooms, invite new users and assign roles of room admin or lower. Room admins can upload forms to the room and have full access to the Complete and In Process folders.
RoleRoomManagerDescription: Room managers can manage the assigned rooms, invite new users and assign roles below their level.
RoomEmptyAtTheMoment: This room is empty at the moment.
RoomLinkExpired: The room link you are trying to open does not exist or has expired.
RoomManagerDescription: Room administration and archiving, user invitation and management. Several admins can be assigned to the room.
RoomQuotaLimitWarning: Room quota limit is about to be reached.
RoomQuotaReached: Room quota limit has been reached.
RoomShareLinkRestrictionActivated: File content copy, file downloading and printing restriction activated.
RoomsModuleDescription: You may create a new room specifically for the backup, choose one of the existing rooms, or save the copy in their {{roomName}} room.
SameEmail: You can't use the same email address
SaveOrChange: Please eliminate the mismatch in the conflicting parameter to proceed or keep your active pricing plan.
SearchEmptyRoomsDescription: No rooms match this filter. Try a different one or clear filter to view all rooms.
SectionMoveNotification: The file will be moved to {{sectionName}} {{date}}
SelectAnOptionOrCreateOne: Select an option or create one
SelectorEmptyScreenHeader: No files and folders here yet
SelectorFilesLimitDescription: When uploading a large amount of data, the context may be partially truncated, which can reduce the accuracy of responses. It’s recommended to limit the number of files and their total size.
SelectorFormRoomEmptyScreenDescription: To share your form and collect responses, please create the Form filling room.
SelectorInfoBarDescription: Share your form and collect responses via a Form filling room. Select an existing room or create a new one.
SelectorInfoBarOfVDRDescription: Share your form via a Virtual Data Room. Assign recipient roles to the room participants so they can fill out the form accordingly. Select an existing room or create a new one.
SelectorVDREmptyScreenDescription: To share your form and assign roles to the room participants for filling it out, please create a Virtual Data Room.
SendNotificationAboutRestoring: Send notification about space restoring to users
ServerErrorEmptyDescription: Please reload the page or come back later.
ServiceConfigurationNotice: This section is used to connect and configure the services. Please note, only the payer can make changes. Reach out to them for any updates.
ServiceManagementUnavailable: Service management is unavailable during the grace period, and no charges will apply to the services during this time. To regain full functionality, please upgrade to a {{planName}} plan.
SetDiskSpaceQuota: Set storage quota to define the maximum disk space for this {{productName}}.
SetQuotaStorageLimit: Set quota to define storage limit.
ShareDocumentDescription: Provide access to the document and set the permission levels.
ShareFolderDescription: Provide access to the folder and set the permission levels.
ShareTheOriginalFormForFillingOut: Share the original form for filling out.
ShareWithPortalUsersDescription: Select specific users from {{productName}} and invite them to fill out the original form.
SingleUploadWarning: Only one file or folder can be uploaded at a time. Please select a single item.
SizeImageLarge: The image size is too large, please select another image.
SkipDescription: No file will be copied. The original file will be retained in the destination folder.
SpreadsheetGenerated: The spreadsheet for {{formName}} is generated based on all completed copies
SpreadsheetUpdated: The spreadsheet for {{formName}} is updated based on all completed copies
StartFillingBarDescription: Select who will complete the fields for each recipient role on this form. Select a recipient role and assign it to a room member
StopFillingBody: Are you sure you want to stop filling? It will be impossible to resume filling out this form after cancellation. Filling out the form will be stopped at the stage it is currently at. The file will be marked as "Stopped".
StorageQuotaReset: Storage quota successfully set to default.
StorageRestrictions: Without action, uploading, creating, and editing files and folders will be restricted until you free up space.
StorageTariffDeactivated: Your additional storage subscription has been deactivated due to non-payment
StorageUponRequest: Additional storage exceeding {{amount}} is available upon request.
StorageWarning: You will keep your full {{amount}} access until the end of your paid billing period. If your storage exceeds the new limit at the start of the next period, you’ll be charged for the actual usage, rounded to the nearest {{storageUnit}}.
SubmitToGalleryBlockBody: Submit your templates to share them with the {{organizationName}} community.
SubscriptionAutoCancellation: Subscription will be automatically canceled on {{finalDate}}
SubscriptionAutoRenewed: Subscription will be automatically renewed on {{finalDate}} with updated pricing and specifications.
SubscriptionAutoRenewedOn: Subscription will be automatically renewed on {{finalDate}}
SubscriptionAutoRenewedWithUpdate: Subscription will be automatically renewed <1>on {{finalDate}}</1> with updated pricing and specifications — <1>{{price}}/month ({{amount}})</1>
SubscriptionExpired: Your subscription to support and updates has expired
SuccessfullySentMessage: Your message was successfully sent. You will be contacted by the Sales Department.
SummarizationDescription: Quickly generate summaries of documents to save time and focus on key points.
SummaryPrompt: Give me a brief summary of all collected data from "{{formName}}"
SwitchPlan: You’re about to switch to the <1>{{planName}} plan</1>.
SyncingKnowledgeBase: Syncing form data to knowledge base...
SystemThemeDescription: Automatically switch between light and dark themes when your system does.
TemporaryStorageDescription: Backup is stored in the 'Backup' section, you will be able to download it within 24 hours after creating.
TextGenerationDescription: Create unique content like articles, letters, or marketing materials in minutes, right within the editor.
TextTranslationDescription: Translate text into your desired language instantly, while maintaining meaning and context.
ThirdPartyDisconnectPrompt: Are you sure you want to remove the {{service}}? This will not affect your {{account}} account in any way.
ThirdPartyResourceDescription: Backup can be saved to your third-party account (Dropbox, Box.com, OneDrive or Google Drive). You need to connect your third-party account (Dropbox, Box.com, OneDrive or Google Drive) before you will be able to save your backup there.
ThirdPartyStorageDescription: Use third-party services as data storage for this room. You can create a new folder or select the existing one in the connected storage.
Title: Title
ToolCallArgCopied: Tool call arguments successfully copied to clipboard
ToolCallResultCopied: Tool call result successfully copied to clipboard
ToppedUpWallet: You have successfully topped up your wallet.
TopUpTakeSomeTimeToComplete: The top-up might take some time to complete
TopUpToReactivateStorage: To reactivate your subscription, please top up your wallet via Services. Once the payment is complete, your additional storage will become available again.
TotalSubmissionsPrompt: How many times has the form "{{formName}}" been submitted?
TourAccess: Manage who can access this forms room. Add Form Admins and Form Managers to control permissions.
TourAiAgent: Enable the AI agent to automatically process submitted forms, extract data, and assist with form review.
TourBilling: Manage your subscription plan and payment details for this forms room.
TourCollectData: Set up automatic data collection from completed forms. Export results to XLSX or connect a MySQL database.
TourCompletedFolder: Each completed file is named with a number, the submitter's name, and the submission date. Use the AI Chat button to ask questions or get summaries about submissions.
TourCompletedForms: Each folder contains all submitted copies of a specific form, organized by submission.
TourCtxAskFromDB: Chat with the AI agent about this form using data from a connected database.
TourInProgress: Each folder corresponds to a specific form and contains draft files from people who started filling but haven't submitted yet.
TourLibrary: Browse ready-made form templates. Pick a template to quickly create a new form without starting from scratch.
TourMyForms: This is your main workspace. All your PDF forms are stored here. Upload new forms or create them from scratch.
TourPlusButton: Use this button to upload existing PDF forms or create new ones from scratch.
TransactionsLimit: The page displays the last 25 transactions for the selected period. The full transaction history is available via the  "{{buttonName}}" button.
TrashMoveConfirmation: Display notification when moving items to {{sectionName}}
TurnOffDiskSpaceLimit: Turn off disk space limit for this {{productName}}.
UnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Try again later or contact support.
UnknownPayerForAdmin: We couldn’t find a contact matching the Stripe email. Billing and services will continue to work, but we recommend contacting the {{productName}} owner to assign a new Payer.
UnknownPayerForOwner: We couldn’t find a contact matching the Stripe email. Your billing and services will continue to work, but we recommend assigning a new Payer to manage billing settings in {{productName}}.
UnsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your updates will be lost. Are you sure you want to leave?
UpgradeToProBannerHeader: Get free access to enterprise-ready office suite for 30 days
UpgradeToProBannerInformationAboutShort: Learn more about {{license}} Edition on the <1>official website</1>
UpgradeToProBannerInstructionDescr: Use the official documentation to upgrade:
UpgradeToProBannerInstructionHeader: To access pro features, start free 30-day trial of {{organizationName}} {{license}} Edition.
UpgradeToProBannerInstructionNote: Please note that the editors will be unavailable during the upgrade. We also recommend to <1>backup your data</1> before you start.
UpgradeToProBannerItemLicenseDescr: + 1-year subscription for functionality and security updates.
UpgradeToProBannerItemMobileDescr: Edit docs, sheets, and slides in mobile browsers.
UpgradeToProBannerItemScalabilityDescr: Comfortably edit and collaborate on docs no matter what size your team is.
UpgradeToProBannerItemSupportDescr: Get quick professional help for all the issues you face.

UserNotFoundMatchingEmail: We couldn’t find the user with the matching Stripe e-mail.
UserQuotaLimitWarning: User quota limit is about to be reached.
UserQuotaReached: User quota limit has been reached.
VirtualDataRoomDescription: Use VDR for advanced file security and transparency. Set watermarks, automatically index and track all content, restrict downloading and copying.
WalletSectionDescription: The {{productName}} Wallet allows you to easily purchase services such as storage, AI tools, and backups. Add funds and select the services you need to get started.
WalletToppedUp: Wallet has been successfully topped up
WantToCancelStoragePlan: Are you sure you want to cancel your additional storage subscription?
WantToContinue: Are you sure you want to continue?
WarningCopyToFormRoom: The file cannot be copied to this room. Please try to copy the {{organizationName}} PDF form.
WelcomeFeature1: Create PDF forms from templates or scratch
WelcomeFeature4: Export results directly to your systems
WhenBalanceDropsTo: When the balance drops to {{min}}, the wallet will be automatically topped up to {{max}}.

YourFurtherEditsNotSaved: Your further edits may not be saved.
YouWillBeContacted: The sales team will contact you after creating the request.
WhiteLabelLogoSubtitle: Upload logos with a transparent background (PNG, SVG, JPG) for light and dark themes, or generate one instantly by entering your Your logo below.
